texto: Emma, you have lived before…in other lifetimes.”I was waiting for him to burst into laughter and tell me this was some ridiculous prank. Where was he going with this?“I have been reincarnated?” “Yes, several times. You accidently breathed in God’s energy at an Egyptian temple and that energy never dies.” I sat there staring blankly, wondering if I had fallen in love with a mad man. “Emma, your soul is confused…”“Between?”“Being human and being God
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Melanie S. Wolfe que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Emma, you have lived before…in other lifetimes.”I was waiting for him to burst into laughter and …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, angels, awakening, com foco em awakening e love.
